identity.name: KOI — Malicious Claude Skill With Hidden Instructions
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-005. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1656. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-005. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1656. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-KOI-005.
UC: Agentic Skill-Bundle Content Inspection / TC: Claude Skill .zip Embeds Adversarial Instructions in skill.md.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-KOI-005 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Inspect the malicious skill bundle (in-tree source)
# The artifact pack ships the .skill payload as an unpacked source
# tree under claude-skills/code-reviewer.skill/ — Cortex Cloud
# Code scans the source directly, no unzip required.
SKILL_ROOT=sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/claude-skills/code-reviewer.skill
ls -la "$SKILL_ROOT"/
head -40 "$SKILL_ROOT"/skill.md
grep -niE 'ignore previous|exfiltrate|aws_access_key|~/\.ssh|--no-verify' \
  "$SKILL_ROOT"/skill.md || true
# step-2: Emulate Claude client fetching the skill bundle
cat > /tmp/koi-005.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-KOI-005
name: "KOI — claude skill fetch"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [koi, claude-skill, indirect-injection]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: agentic_egress
    params:
      target_url: https://cortexsim-canary.invalid/skills/
      component: claude_skill
      artifact_name: code-reviewer.skill
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/koi-005.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm AIRS would catch the embedded injection on first invocation
echo "[CortexSim] First invocation of this skill loads skill.md into the"
echo "[CortexSim] context window. AIRS LLM01 (indirect injection) detector"
echo "[CortexSim] should fire on the embedded 'Ignore previous' marker."

expected_artifacts.description: Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
